constraint_retention.description: Score for how well the candidate retains core constraints, safety rules, and boundaries from the baseline.

novelty.description: Score for how much useful, novel behavior or improvement the candidate introduces.

brevity.description: Score for conciseness and lack of token waste.

fatal_degradations.description: List of any catastrophic rule omissions, safety violations, or structural corruptions. If empty, the candidate is valid. If populated, the candidate is disqualified.
